title: Moses App Catalog Manifest
description: Schema for apps/<slug>/manifest.yaml in the moses-app-catalog repo. Fields map 1:1 onto the community_marketplace_tools table in the Moses platform so that Moses instances can perform a simple upsert on sync.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

toolKey.description: Globally unique slug. Must equal the parent directory name under apps/. Lowercase, must start with a letter, alphanumerics, hyphens, and underscores only.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the App Store UI.

description.description: Short description (shown in listing cards). Max 1000 chars to match backend validator.

longDescription.description: Long-form description (shown on detail page). Max 5000 chars to match backend validator.

repositoryUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL to the source repository. Required when repositoryType is github or gitlab. Omit for closed-source listings (repositoryType=oci).

repositoryType.description: Source hosting. 'github' and 'gitlab' require a public repositoryUrl. 'oci' is for closed-source listings where only the image + manifest + Helm chart are published; such listings require a populated 'trust' block and established-contributor vouching.

defaultBranch.description: Default branch name (informational; images are pinned to digests, not branches).

category.description: Top-level category slug. Keep short and human-readable.

tags.description: Freeform tags. Max 10, each max 50 chars, to match backend validator.

dockerfilePath.description: Path to Dockerfile relative to repo root.

buildContext.description: Docker build context relative to repo root.

helmChartPath.description: Optional path to a Helm chart inside the source repo. Only meaningful when repositoryType is github or gitlab. If unset, Moses generates a default chart.

helmChartRef.description: OCI reference to a published Helm chart (e.g. 'oci://ghcr.io/vendor/app-chart'). Required for closed-source (repositoryType=oci) listings where no public source repo is available. Must be a public registry; authenticated pulls are not supported by Moses instances on sync.

helmChartVersion.description: Chart version tag/SemVer to pair with helmChartRef. Required alongside helmChartRef; a chart reference without a pinned version is rejected because tags are mutable. A leading 'v' is permitted (many chart registries publish as 'v1.2.3').

iconUrl.description: HTTPS URL to a square icon (SVG preferred, PNG >=128px acceptable). Must be publicly accessible without auth.

screenshotUrls.description: HTTPS URLs to screenshots. Max 5 to match backend validator.

maintainers.description: People responsible for this listing. At least one owner required.

email.description: Contact email. Kept for maintainer correspondence; not rendered in the public App Store UI.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the app source code (see https://spdx.org/licenses/).

supportContact.description: Email address or HTTPS URL where users can reach the maintainer.

licenseServerListingId.description: UUID identifying this app's listing in the Moses license server. Required for any paid model.

licenseServerSellerId.description: UUID of the seller account in the Moses license server.

versions.description: Released versions, newest last. At least one required.

trust.description: Required for closed-source listings (repositoryType=oci). Establishes the maintainer's reputation and distribution terms so reviewers can make a trust decision without a public source repo.

statement.description: Freeform markdown statement from the maintainer explaining who they are, why the code is closed-source, and what existing Moses/open-source work they have shipped that reviewers can use to assess trust. Typically 200-2000 chars.

vouchedBy.description: GitHub handles of at least two existing moses-app-catalog maintainers or established moses-platform contributors who have reviewed the submission and are vouching for the submitter. Handles are verified against the catalog CODEOWNERS and platform contributor lists.

distributionType.description: How the app's runtime is distributed. 'proprietary-binary' means only the built image ships publicly. 'helm-only' means a Helm chart + image ship publicly but source does not. 'commercial' means a paid proprietary product.

priorWork.description: Optional links to prior moses-platform, moses-app-catalog, or public open-source work by the submitter that reviewers can reference.

signing.description: Populated by CI on merge. Submitters should leave this block out.
